summary: Backend testing completed for Admin Products API and Pet Photo API fixes. All 17 tests passed. Verified: 1) Admin Products API returns 650 products from unified_products collection, 2) Pet Photo API serves images correctly with proper content-type, 3) Pet Photo Upload validates file types and pet existence, 4) New /api/pet-photo/{pet_id}/{filename} endpoint works correctly for Kubernetes ingress compatibility.

admin_products_api.details: GET /api/admin/products returns 650 products from unified_products collection (default source). Legacy products collection has 418 products. Response includes products, total, categories, pillars, and source fields.

admin_products_count_650.details: Verified unified_products collection has exactly 650 products as expected.

admin_products_filter_by_pillar.details: Pillar filtering works. Available pillars: adopt, advisory, community, emergency, farewell, fit, groom, insure, learn, paperwork.

admin_products_auth.details: Admin products endpoint correctly requires authentication (returns 401 without auth).

admin_single_product.details: GET /api/admin/products/{id} returns product details from legacy products collection.

pet_photo_serve.details: GET /api/pet-photo/{pet_id}/{filename} serves pet photos correctly. Tested with pet-99a708f1722a photo (258642 bytes, image/jpeg content-type).

pet_photo_404.details: Non-existent pet photos return 404 as expected.

pet_photo_upload_validation.details: POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo validates: 1) Pet must exist (404 for non-existent), 2) File must be image (400 for non-image files).

pet_photo_url_conversion.details: New API path format /api/pet-photo/{pet_id}/{filename} works correctly. Frontend petAvatar.js converts old /static/uploads/pets/ paths to new /api/pet-photo/ paths.

critical_code_review_comments: Note: GET /api/admin/products/{product_id} queries 'products' collection (legacy), not 'unified_products'. This is intentional as it's used for editing legacy products. If unified products need single-item editing, a separate endpoint may be needed.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing pet photo for pet-99a708f1722a
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Products API now queries unified_products collection by default (650 products). Use source='legacy' for old products collection (418 products). Pet photos are served via /api/pet-photo/{pet_id}/{filename} endpoint for Kubernetes ingress compatibility. The frontend petAvatar.js utility converts old /static/uploads/pets/ paths to new /api/pet-photo/ paths automatically.

verified_fixes.pet_photo_api_endpoint: VERIFIED - /api/pet-photo/{pet_id}/{filename} serves images with correct content-type
verified_fixes.pet_photo_upload: VERIFIED - POST /api/pets/{pet_id}/photo uploads and stores photos correctly
verified_fixes.frontend_path_conversion: DOCUMENTED - petAvatar.js converts old static paths to new API paths
